Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Defts' Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Pot Bond By Date Certain; Request For Attorney Fees;
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. RESPONDENT JAMES PHILLIPSEN'S MOTION TO DISMISS DEFENDANTS' APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR AN ORDER TO POST BOND BY DATE CERTAIN; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES is off calendar - insufficient notice.
